core_logic_signatures.name: __init__
core_logic_signatures.source:
def __init__(self, config: Dict[str, Any]):
        super().__init__(config)
        self.persona = "Quantum Risk Physicist"

        # Initialize Engines if available
        self.qmc_engine = QuantumMonteCarloEngine() if QMC_AVAILABLE else None
        self.gre_engine = GenerativeRiskEngine() if GRE_AVAILABLE else None

core_logic_signatures.name: execute
core_logic_signatures.note: In a real telemetry pipeline, large functions can be truncated or omitted entirely in favor of the 'ast_hash' to save network bandwidth and storage costs.

core_logic_signatures.name: _generate_heuristic_scenarios
core_logic_signatures.source:
def _generate_heuristic_scenarios(self, ticker: str) -> List[QuantumScenario]:
        """
        Generates plausible "Unknown Unknowns" when deep simulation is unavailable.
        """
        return [
            QuantumScenario(
                scenario_name="Geopolitical Flashpoint (Taiwan Straits)",
                probability="Low",
                impact_severity="Critical",
                estimated_impact_ev="-40%"
            ),
            QuantumScenario(
                scenario_name="Technological Singularity (AGI)",
                probability="Low",
                impact_severity="High",
                estimated_impact_ev="+200%"
            )
        ]
